capability.name: Dependency Analysis
capability.description: Given a set of tasks, identify which depend on which. Construct valid execution orderings and spot circular dependencies or missing prerequisites.

templates.promptTemplate:
Here are tasks for a project:

{{task_list}}

For each task, identify which other tasks it depends on (must be completed first). Then provide a valid execution order. If any tasks can run in parallel, note that.

Explain your reasoning for each dependency.

sets.task_list:
A. Write unit tests for the API
B. Design the database schema
C. Implement API endpoints
D. Set up the testing framework
E. Run database migrations
F. Deploy to staging

A. Configure DNS records
B. Provision SSL certificate
C. Deploy application containers
D. Set up load balancer
E. Build Docker images
F. Run smoke tests

A. Create user registration endpoint
B. Set up email service integration
C. Implement password hashing
D. Build email verification flow
E. Create login endpoint
F. Add rate limiting middleware

criteria.description: Identified valid starting tasks (no unmet dependencies)
Placed terminal tasks at the end

sets.dependency_spec:
- Deploy app (depends on: Run tests)
- Run tests (depends on: Build app)
- Build app (depends on: Update config)
- Update config (depends on: Deploy app)

- Task A (depends on: Task B, Task C)
- Task B (depends on: Task D)
- Task C (depends on: Task D)
- Task D (depends on: nothing)
- Task E (depends on: Task F)
- Task F (depends on: Task E)

- Generate report (depends on: Aggregate data)
- Aggregate data (depends on: Clean data, Validate data)
- Clean data (depends on: Import data)
- Validate data (depends on: Import data)
- Import data (depends on: nothing)
- Send report (depends on: Generate report, Get recipient list)
- Get recipient list (depends on: nothing)

criteria.description: Correctly identified the presence or absence of cycles
Proposed a reasonable fix or optimization
